dsl_rule.translation_notes: Short White Candle pattern identified by: (1) small body relative to ATR; (2) upper shadow shorter than body; (3) lower shadow shorter than body. Color validation (white candle = close > open) is implicit in entry conditions. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per signal specification, so both entry_long and entry_short are populated with identical conditions. Exit conditions use simple reversal logic since AUTHOR_SILENT. Sample size of 4,886 candles noted but not encoded as testable condition.

source_rule_text: Short White Candle: A single white candlestick with a short body and both upper and lower shadows shorter than the body height
